name: CMS: Human Review of AI-Written Policy
description: Use of AI tools to draft CMS policies is followed by human review; AI supports but does not substitute for human decisions.
rationale: CMS BR-AI-4: human review must follow use of AI tools to write CMS policies; humans must be in the loop for strategic/compliance activities.

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
